description_long: This house features a modern, single-story layout with multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a spacious living area. The structure is characterized by clean, white exterior walls and large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. Several balconies and terraces with blue-tinted glass railings surround the house, providing outdoor living areas and garden spaces. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections featuring skylights or open-air patios. The house includes a main entryway with steps leading up to a glass door, and the landscaping incorporates green lawns and potted plants. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with white walls, large windows, flat roof, and multiple balconies with blue glass railings, surrounded by landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main living areas, large windows, and a prominent balcony with blue glass railings at the front.
description_view_1: From this angle, the entryway with steps and a glass door is visible, along with a spacious garden terrace on the right side.
description_view_2: This perspective showcases the extensive backyard garden, multiple balconies, and the open-plan layout of the house.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals additional balconies, a rooftop patio, and the arrangement of bedrooms and bathrooms along the back side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a wide glass door, and a small overhang, flanked by glass railings and minimalistic landscaping.
